en: Ladies and gentlemen, please welcome Donald Trump.
ko: 신사 숙녀 여러분, 도널드 트럼프를 환영해 주세요.

en: -♪ And if you could go far ♪
♪ Twenty feet far so I could see you ♪
-♪ Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh ♪
Donald, I want to ask you, because the next time I see you, you could be the president of the United States.
ko: 도널드, 물어볼 게 있는데, 다음에 만나면 미국 대통령이 될 수도 있으니까.

en: I just wanted to know if there's something we could do that's just not presidential, really,
ko: 대통령답지 않은 걸 뭔가 할 수 있는지 알고 싶었어요,

en: or something that we can do now that we're just both civilians.
ko: 아니면 둘 다 그냥 민간인인 지금 할 수 있는 거요.

en: I'm not liking the sound of this. Go ahead.
Could I mess your hair up? -♪ Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh ♪ What?
I'll be gentle. I'll be gentle.
-♪ And if you could go far so I could see you ♪ I'm gonna be in about an hour from now.
I hope they're going to understand. Go ahead with my hairspray.
-♪ Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Donald Trump, everybody!
I'll do it again. Donald Trump, everybody!
ko: 한 번 더 할게요. 도널드 트럼프, 여러분!
